source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A student determines the specific latent heat of vaporisation of a liquid using the apparatus illustrated in Fig. 3.1. The heater is switched on. When the liquid is boiling at a constant rate, the balance reading is noted at 2.0 minute intervals. After 10 minutes, the current in the heater is reduced and the balance readings are taken for a further 12 minutes. The readings of the ammeter and of the voltmeter are given in Fig. 3.2. The variation with time of the balance reading is shown in Fig. 3.3. From time 0 to time 10.0 minutes, the mass of liquid evaporated is 56 g . Calculate the rate at which thermal energy is transferred to the surroundings.
extraction_notes: image entries are PIL object representations rather than file paths or URLs

issues: metadata.image_paths contains PIL object representations rather than file paths or URLs

image_dependency: 题干显式要求使用 Fig. 3.1、Fig. 3.2、Fig. 3.3，关键信息来自装置图、仪表读数和质量-时间图。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明不是主要依赖纯文本即可解答。
asset_registry_record 中有 3 张相关图片且均 exists=true，支持图像确为题目核心输入。
multi_step: 需要从 Fig. 3.2 读取电流和电压，再结合 0-10 min 蒸发质量 56 g 与 Fig. 3.3 的变化进行计算，不是单一步骤直取答案。
题目包含前 10 分钟与后 12 分钟两段不同加热条件，涉及比较/联立热功率与散热关系，具有多阶段推理特征。
最终要求的是“向周围环境传递热能的速率”，通常需经过单位换算和中间物理量推导，过程性较强。
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，标准答案给为明确数值加单位“75 W”，结果形式清晰。
图像均已登记存在，且 registry_passed=true，后续可通过读图和物理公式复核答案。
可验证性较高，但仪表和图线读数可能存在轻微读图容差，因此不打满分。

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths contains PIL object representations rather than file paths or URLs

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和3张关键图片均已登记且存在，核心语义资产完整。
初步评分较高：图像依赖强、多步推理明显、答案可验证性高，符合候选池保留条件。
已知风险主要是读图容差和元数据中的 image_paths 表示问题，但未影响当前可用图片资产与核心语义恢复。

agent_assessment.rationale: The question text is complete and specifies the task, expected quantity, and given mass loss. The three figures are semantically clear: the apparatus setup, the ammeter/voltmeter readings, and the balance-versus-time graph can all be read well enough to support the calculation. The image is required, but the text-image pair is understandable.
